title: brickellia urolepis
intro: Brickellia urolepis, also known as Mexican Brickellia, is a flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory infections, with health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Brickellia urolepis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
